case_title: SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. BAGAN, MATT et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JEFF MARGULIES AS COUNSEL. PL. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 3937 IRVING ST, #1, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICT- TION STAYED TO 12-31-93 - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - $1,000 CASH PD. TO PL. ATTY. BY DEF. - SEC. DEPOSIT/LAST MO. RENT RETAINED BY PL. - DEF. CERTIFIES THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - IF DEF. VACATES BY 12-31-93 PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. - PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. PL. ATTY. TO PREAPRE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAGAN, MATT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3937 IRVING ST, SF, CA $1,332.57 RENT, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,582.57, LEASE FORFEITED
